div.p: This case-sensitive code system http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/CodeSystem/opioidcds-overrideReasons defines the following codes:

tr.td: Disable the alert for 1 month for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
Disable the alert for 3 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
Disable the alert for 6 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
Disable the alert for 1 year for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
Snooze Alert for 1 Month with a Comment
Disable the alert for 1 month for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
Snooze Alert for 3 Months with a Comment
Disable the alert for 3 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
Snooze Alert for 6 Months with a Comment
Disable the alert for 6 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
Snooze Alert for 1 Year with a Comment
Disable the alert for 1 year for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
A comment about the received information or suggestion. This can include feedback for improvement/refinement.
The order will be updated to the order(s) suggested by the service
The order will be canceled based on the information provided by the service
An application will be used to complete the workflow
The suggestion provided by the service has been accepted
The suggestion provided by the service has been accepted. Additional action(s) documented in an associated comment
The suggestion provided by the service has been declined
The suggestion provided by the service has been declined. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment

description.value: Override reasons for the 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline for Prescribing Opioids for Pain

copyright.value: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)

definition.value: Disable the alert for 1 month for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
Disable the alert for 3 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
Disable the alert for 6 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
Disable the alert for 1 year for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization

display.value: Snooze Alert for 1 Month with a Comment

definition.value: Disable the alert for 1 month for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment

display.value: Snooze Alert for 3 Months with a Comment

definition.value: Disable the alert for 3 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment

display.value: Snooze Alert for 6 Months with a Comment

definition.value: Disable the alert for 6 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment

display.value: Snooze Alert for 1 Year with a Comment

definition.value: Disable the alert for 1 year for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
A comment about the received information or suggestion. This can include feedback for improvement/refinement.
The order will be updated to the order(s) suggested by the service
The order will be canceled based on the information provided by the service
An application will be used to complete the workflow
The suggestion provided by the service has been accepted
The suggestion provided by the service has been accepted. Additional action(s) documented in an associated comment
The suggestion provided by the service has been declined
The suggestion provided by the service has been declined. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
